prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **EA888 Gen 3B (CJXB)** 2.0L TSI engine, targeting 380 HP and 450 Nm with a **Garrett GT2867RS .86 A/R turbocharger**, **APR High-Flow Carbon Fiber Intake System**, and **APR Cast-Downpipe with 3.5" diameter** for optimized spool and reduced backpressure. Includes **NGK 97506 (1-step colder) spark plugs** and **APR R4-TSI fuel pump** for sustained high-load fueling.

KW Suspensions **Clubsport Coilover Kit (3-way adjustable)** with **KW-specific spring rates (800 lbs/in front, 600 lbs/in rear)** and **monotube dampers** for aggressive cornering, paired with **H&R 25mm Front / 20mm Rear Anti-Roll Bars** to eliminate body roll. Includes **034 Motorsport Density Line Subframe Bushings** to sharpen chassis response.

Brembo **GT 6-Piston Front / 4-Piston Rear Big Brake Kit** with **380mm two-piece rotors (floating, slotted)** and **Brembo H12 compound pads**, paired with **Goodridge G-Stop 650 Braided Stainless Steel Brake Lines** and **Motul RBF 660 Racing Brake Fluid** for fade-resistant stopping power under repeated high-G deceleration.
estetica: **Rieger Tuning RS6-Style Front Bumper** with **integrated carbon fiber splitter (30mm overhang)** and **functional air curtains**, paired with **Rieger RS6-Style Rear Diffuser** and **carbon fiber side skirts** for aggressive aero balance. Includes **custom PPF (Paint Protection Film) in XPEL Stealth** for full-body coverage.

**VMR V710 20x9.5 ET35 (Front) / 20x10.5 ET40 (Rear) wheels** in **Gloss Black with milled faces**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 Connect (255/35/20 Front, 275/30/20 Rear)** for maximum mechanical grip. Includes **H&R TRAK+ Wheel Spacers (15mm Front, 20mm Rear)** for flush fitment.

**OEM+ Euro-spec LED Tail Lights (VW Part #5NA945096G)** with **Smoked Lens Tint (Llumar ATR Automotive Window Film, 20% VLT)** and **custom rear wiper delete (carbon fiber cover)**. Interior upgrades include **Recaro Sportster CS (Front) / OEM VW R-Line Rear Seats (retrimmed in Alcantara with red stitching)** and **Momo Mod.78 Steering Wheel (380mm, suede, flat-bottom)** with **VW R-specific airbag delete module**.
